As Featured On
The Practice

Four roles, one mission.

Empowering professionals and organisations to grow sustainably — through mindset, skillset, and process.

01 — Coach

Sales Coach

Helping sales professionals master mindset, skillset, and process to close bigger deals and win consistently.

02 — Advisor

Strategic Advisor

Operating partner to high-growth companies — scaling sales and driving sustainable revenue growth.

03 — Speaker

Keynote Speaker

Powerful keynotes on sales mastery, leadership, and resilience that inspire durable peak performance.

04 — Author

Bestselling Author

The RISEUP series — works for ambitious professionals who want sustainable success without burnout.

Subject-Matter Expertise

What Deepak speaks on.

Four interconnected disciplines that move teams from intent to execution.

Topic 01

Sales Mastery

The essential elements of consistent success — mindset, skillset, and process. Confidence, emotional intelligence, and advanced negotiation that elevate every part of sales performance.

MindsetEQNegotiation
Topic 02

Career Longevity

Building resilience and mental toughness to convert setbacks into compounding advantage. Sustained motivation, adapting to change, avoiding burnout — while earnings and fulfillment go up.

ResilienceAnti-burnoutGrowth
Topic 03

Sales Process Optimization

Repeatable, scalable frameworks — prospecting, playbooks, pipeline hygiene, forecast accuracy. Removing inefficiencies and lifting close rates without lifting headcount.

PlaybooksPipelineForecasting
Topic 04

Leadership in the AI Era

Why putting AI on top of a broken process just scales the garbage. Judgement, taste, and the human capabilities AI does not replace — and how to lead teams through the transition.

AIJudgementTeams
The Bhootra Method

Mindset. Skillset. Process.

A simple framework, taught for over two decades — applied across global sales organisations and the RISEUP community.

01

Mindset First

Confidence, emotional intelligence, and an adult-to-adult posture in every conversation. Sales is an energy game.

02

Skillset Sharpened

The Sandler discipline — pain funnel, qualification, control. Skills practised until they become reflex, not script.

03

Process Mastered

Repeatable systems for prospecting, qualifying, closing. The work that survives every reorg and every market.

04

Longevity Earned

Resilience, dignity, and the long game. Selling without losing your soul — a career that compounds over decades.

Audiences

Three rooms he moves.

Whether you serve founders, frontline sellers, or sales leaders — Deepak speaks their language.

01 — Founders

Owners & Entrepreneurs

Strategies to optimize sales processes, scale revenue, and build a resilient business that doesn't depend on heroics.

02 — Sellers

Sales Professionals

Actionable techniques to exceed targets, close bigger deals, and thrive in increasingly competitive AI-shaped markets.

03 — Leaders

Sales Leaders

How to lead teams to success, implement effective strategies, and engineer long-term growth — not quarter-to-quarter survival.
